arts.ttl: Why Ruben Amorim has changed his mind on Manchester United midfielder Casemiro
arts.sum: Casemiro is back in favour at Man Utd after a long spell in the wilderness and Ruben Amorim has explained his change of heart.

arts.ttl: "Not clever enough" - Pep Guardiola comments confirm Man City transfer priority
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola praised one of his makeshift defenders as Manchester City drew with Manchester United - but they are comments that read particularly damingly.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim hits back at "critical" Gary Neville after transfer plan slammed
arts.sum: Manchester United battled to a 0-0 draw with neighbours Manchester City over the weekend with Ruben Amorim and Gary Neville being involved in a verbal back and forth both before and after the game

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer flop Memphis Depay forces league bosses to introduce new rule
arts.sum: Memphis Depay struggled to make an impact during his time in the Premier League with Manchester United but his actions at his current club have prompted a rule change

arts.ttl: Why Garnacho was only 'shining light' in Manchester derby
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundit Troy Deeney explains why Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho was the only "shining light" in the goalless Manchester derby.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim issues Harry Maguire fitness update for crunch Europa League tie after defender came off in Manchester derby
arts.sum: Manchester united boss Ruben Amorim as given fans an update on the fitness of Harry Maguire after the defender was taken off during Sunday's Manchester derby.

arts.ttl: Man City formulate Nico O'Reilly contract tactic as Chelsea seek Cole Palmer transfer 'repeat'
arts.sum: Manchester City youngster Nico O'Reilly is in line for a double-your-money contract at the Etihad Stadium, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes honest observation about every single struggling Man Utd star
arts.sum: Manchester United earned a battling draw against local rivals Manchester City at Old Trafford on Sunday and Ruben Amorin has made an honest admission about his side

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola condemns Man Utd supporters over ‘lack of class’ after Phil Foden chants
arts.sum: The home fans directed derogatory chants at Foden during the goalless draw at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Gary Neville calls out Man United and Man City during derby - 'this has got to stop'
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news after the 0-0 draw in the derby with Manchester City at Old Trafford about what Gary Neville said during the Sky Sports coverage
